responsibilities: Translate complex business questions into structured analytical frameworks that drive executive decision-making
Build optimization models that recommend resource allocation, pricing, or operational strategies under constraints
Design and analyze controlled experiments to isolate causal impact of business interventions on key metrics
Develop forecasting models to predict demand, revenue, and operational metrics across business units
Partner with senior leadership to evaluate trade-offs between competing strategic initiatives using quantitative analysis
Build simulation models to stress-test business scenarios and quantify risk under varying assumptions
Communicate complex analytical findings through clear narratives and visualizations tailored to executive audiences
Collaborate with data engineering teams to ensure reliable, high-quality data feeds for decision models
Develop and maintain econometric models to measure long-term effects of pricing and marketing decisions
Establish frameworks for ongoing measurement and monitoring of strategic initiative performance
